assumption_checks.assumption: Web app, runs entirely in the browser, no backend service.
assumption_checks.evidence: grep across output/integration/ for fetch(, axios, XMLHttpRequest, WebSocket returns 0 hits; index.html loads only local <script src> files; no network code anywhere.

assumption_checks.assumption: Multiple lists, user-editable: add, rename, remove.
assumption_checks.evidence: state-model.js exposes createList, renameList, deleteList; interactions.js wires data-action='add-list', click-on-list-title rename, and data-action='delete-list'; cv-runner scenarios f, g, h all pass.

assumption_checks.assumption: Cards have at minimum a text title; users can create, edit, delete.
assumption_checks.evidence: state-model.js exposes createCard, editCard, deleteCard. Card object shape is {id, title} only (matches IP1.A1). interactions.js wires add-card form, click-card to edit, and delete-card button. cv-runner scenarios b, e plus S5.A4-A6 contracts honored.

assumption_checks.assumption: DnD covers between-lists and within-list reordering.
assumption_checks.evidence: dnd.js wireDnd handles both: same-list drop calls reorderCard, cross-list drop calls moveCard (lines 121-125). cv-runner scenarios c (cross-list) and d (same-list reorder contract) both pass.
persistence.js uses localStorage exclusively under STORAGE_KEY='kanban-board:v1'; load/save/clear all delegate to localStorage. No IndexedDB, no cookies, no remote sync.
grep for login/signup/auth/password/userId returns no matches in code; no User entity in state-model; no auth UI in ui-render.

assumption_checks.assumption: Autosave on every state mutation; no Save button.
assumption_checks.evidence: app.js line 28-30: stateModel.subscribe(state => Persistence.save(state)); state-model notify() fires after every mutation. cv-runner scenarios e, f, g, h all confirm localStorage updated immediately. No Save button anywhere in ui-render.
dnd.js uses only HTML5 dragstart/dragover/dragenter/dragleave/drop/dragend events; no TouchEvent, no Sortable.js, no Hammer.js, no third-party DnD lib referenced anywhere.

assumption_checks.assumption: No undo/redo, history, or trash; deletes are immediate and permanent.
assumption_checks.evidence: grep for undo/redo/archive/trash returns no matches in user-facing code; deleteCard and deleteList immediately splice from state; no undo UI rendered.
State shape is {lists: [...]} at root, not boards-keyed; STORAGE_KEY is a single string, not parameterized; no board-switcher UI in ui-render.js.

assumption_checks.assumption: First-load seed of To Do / Doing / Done.
assumption_checks.evidence: state-model.js buildDefaultSeed() creates exactly [{name:'To Do'}, {name:'Doing'}, {name:'Done'}] with empty cards. createStateModel(null) uses this seed. cv-runner scenario a confirms titles render as ['To Do','Doing','Done'] with 0 cards.

out_of_scope_checks.item: User accounts, authentication, login, or signup

out_of_scope_checks.evidence: no fetch/axios/XHR/WebSocket; index.html script tags are local only

out_of_scope_checks.item: Multi-user collaboration, sharing boards, or real-time sync
out_of_scope_checks.evidence: no socket/sync code; single localStorage key
state shape is single {lists:[]}; no board switcher UI
card schema is {id, title} only; no description/dueDate/labels/etc. fields anywhere (matches IP1.A1)

out_of_scope_checks.item: Search, filter, or sort across cards
out_of_scope_checks.evidence: no search/filter/sort UI in ui-render; no corresponding state-model APIs
no undo/redo/archive/trash code; deletes splice immediately
no TouchEvent handling; no Sortable/Hammer libs; HTML5 dragstart only

out_of_scope_checks.item: Theming, dark mode toggle, custom styling
out_of_scope_checks.evidence: no theme switcher; styles.css is a single static stylesheet
only Enter/Escape handled on inline inputs (per section-5 acceptance); no global shortcut map
no Notification API usage; no due-date field in card schema
no analytics SDK; no activity log emitted

inflection_point_checks.evidence: Card object shape in state-model.js (lines 33-37, 135) is exactly {id, title}; createCard signature is (listId, title) with no description parameter; ui-render.js renders only .card-title span — no .card-description, no detail-modal trigger, no expand affordance.

inflection_point_checks.branch: Lists fixed in creation order; only cards draggable
inflection_point_checks.evidence: ui-render.js renderList does NOT set draggable on the list element or list-header; no dragstart handler is wired for lists; state-model exposes no reorderList mutation (grep confirms only the comment 'Per IP2: there is no reorderList' on line 9). Card elements have draggable='true' (line 49).

artifact_exercise_results.detail: rendered ['To Do','Doing','Done'] with 0 cards and add-list affordance

artifact_exercise_results.scenario: b. add card persists across reload
artifact_exercise_results.detail: card 'My Card' still in 'To Do' after simulated reload (localStorage replayed into fresh DOM)

artifact_exercise_results.scenario: c. dnd between lists changes state
artifact_exercise_results.detail: cA moved L1 -> L2 via dragstart/dragenter/dragover/drop event sequence; state and DOM reflect move

Same-list drop dispatches reorderCard with correct (cardId='B', listId='L'); moveCard not called. Direct reorderCard(B,L,0) yields order [B,A]. (jsdom layout limitation requires verifying the wired-up contract rather than the y-coordinate index calculation.)
click on .card-delete removes card from DOM and from localStorage
click on list-title -> inline-edit -> Enter; new name renders and persists
click add-list -> 'Backlog' -> Enter; new column appears as rightmost and persists
click delete-list with confirm stubbed true; list and cards removed from DOM and localStorage

edge_case_testing_summary.rerun_note: Re-executed test-runner.js during CV pass; output identical: 16 PASS / 0 FAIL covering S1.A2-A8, S2.A1-A5, S3.A1/A2/A4, S4.A3/A4, S5.A7.

summary: PASS. The integrated kanban-board artifact in output/integration/ honors all 11 ledger assumptions, all 14 out-of-scope items remain absent, and both inflection points (IP1 title-only cards, IP2 fixed list order) follow their default branches. All 16 edge-case-testing assertions still pass on rerun. All 8 CV artifact-exercise scenarios pass against a real jsdom-loaded build of the actual deployed code (state-model + persistence + ui-render + dnd + interactions wired together). One scenario (d. reorder within list) verifies the wired contract and underlying state-model behavior rather than the pixel-level drop-index calculation, because jsdom does not perform CSS layout — but the same-list-drop -> reorderCard wiring path and the reorderCard outcome are both directly exercised. No Sev 0 fixes required. Artifact is ready for delivery.
